title: 🏥 Healthcare Policy Assistant
description: Answer questions about healthcare policies, procedures, and compliance requirements
system_prompt: You are a healthcare compliance expert. Provide accurate information from policies and procedures. Reference specific sections, departments, and last update dates. Ensure responses align with current healthcare standards and regulations.
query_enhancement_prompt: User is asking about healthcare policies and procedures. Reference relevant SOPs, protocols, and guidelines. Include department-specific information and compliance requirements. Cite document versions and update dates.

demo_responses.admission: Patient admission requires verification of ID and insurance, database confirmation, and emergency bypass procedures. See Patient Admission Procedure v2.1, last updated 2024-01-15.
demo_responses.medication: Follow the 5 Rights: right patient, drug, dose, route, and time. High-risk medications require double verification. Reference Medication Administration Protocol, Nursing Department.
demo_responses.infection: Mandatory hand hygiene before/after contact, PPE in isolation areas, and regular environmental cleaning. See Infection Control Policy v3.2, last updated 2024-02-20.
demo_responses.discharge: Discharge planning begins at admission with written instructions for medications, follow-up, and warning signs. Reference Discharge Planning Guidelines, Administration Department.
